Clucille RosellFounder & Baker
Meet the baker

It started with one
impossible craving.

I couldn't find the cookie I wanted anywhere — the one with the gooey middle, the crackly top, the chocolate that stretches when it's still warm. So I started baking it myself, one small batch at a time.

Friends asked for more. Then friends of friends. Clookies is still just me, in my kitchen, baking every order by hand the day it goes out. No shortcuts. No shelves. Just the cookie I always wished existed.

Happiness, baked to order.
The lineup

Six ways to be
happy.

Every batch is made to order. Mix and match by the piece — or let one flavor ruin all the others for you.

Belgian Chocolate Chip

35php

The classic, elevated. Real Belgian chocolate, crackly top, gooey middle. The one that started it all.

Bestseller

S'mores

35php

Toasted marshmallow, melted chocolate, graham crunch. Campfire feelings, no campfire required.

Warm & nostalgic

Cookie Butter

40php

Speculoos through and through, finished with that signature drizzle. Sweet, smooth, quietly addictive.

Quietly addictive

Choco Walnut

35php

Strong and composed on the outside, soft and full of depth within. You've got layers.

For the deep ones

Revel Bars

30php

Oat-cookie crust, fudgy chocolate center, crumbly top. Intense and affectionate — in the best way.

Unforgettable

The Mixed Box

From 180php

Can't choose? Don't. A box of four or six, your pick of the lineup. The easiest gift you'll ever give.

Best for sharing

How it works

No storefront. On purpose.

Baking to order is the only way every cookie reaches you fresh and gooey. Here's the simple part — how you get yours.

i.

Order any day

Pre-orders are open daily — no waiting for a set drop day. Browse the lineup and decide what's calling your name.

ii.

Reserve by DM

Send a message on Instagram with your order. Everything is baked to order, so the sooner you book, the better.

iii.

Delivered fresh

Your box is baked and delivered in Mandaue City at least 3 days after you order. Break one open while it's warm. Trust us.

Baked fresh to order

Some things are
worth the pre-order.

Pre-orders are open every day. Place yours now — everything is baked to order and delivered at least 3 days later, fresh from the oven.

Order on Instagram → Back to the menu
